meta.title: Rankings — Service Menu
meta.tagline: When someone searches Google or asks an AI engine after an injury — your firm is the answer.

flagship.name: PI Flagship
flagship.blurb: The long-term growth engine. Present the Flagship first and anchor value at the $10k–$40k level.
flagship.footnote: Monthly investment covers strategy, production, and management. Paid media ad spend (LSA, PPC) is billed separately and set jointly.

components.name: Paid Media & Ads Management
components.blurb: Full-service paid media management — Google Ads, LSA, and Meta — run by a dedicated specialist. Management fee scales with monthly ad spend; ad spend is billed separately.

components.name: Web Maintenance
components.blurb: Continuous website updates, technical improvements, and development support. Each tier includes a monthly pool of development hours for edits, enhancements, and change requests.
deliverables: Routine website edits, content updates, and styling fixes
New components, sections, and template expansions (higher tiers)
CRO-focused updates aligned with performance data
Priority support and faster turnaround at higher tiers

components.name: Social Media Management
components.blurb: Growth tier — up to 4 posts/week: a mix of static graphics, attorney/team photos, multi-image graphics, 1 short-form video/month, and Instagram Stories. Adds Instagram for Reels/Stories with light video scripting + repurposing.
details: Static graphics, team photos, multi-image graphics
Instagram Reels/Stories + light video scripting & repurposing

components.name: Premium Hosting & Security
components.blurb: Rankings.io premium hosting infrastructure, beginning immediately upon website launch. Optional — you may transition to your own hosting at any time.
details: Capacity for up to 100,000 monthly visitors; 20GB storage / 240GB bandwidth
NitroPack real-time optimization; 99.9% uptime with monitoring
Web Application Firewall (Sucuri) + continuous malware scanning
Automatic security updates and daily automated backups
Direct technical support, plugin management, and form testing

components.name: 90-Day Technical Architecture & GEO Sprint
components.blurb: A 90-day intensive that moves beyond SEO cleanup into Generative Engine Optimization — stripping digital friction and building the Knowledge Graph needed to dominate AI-driven search (Gemini, Perplexity, SGE).
details: Technical crawl, indexation, and site-health remediation
Knowledge Graph & entity development for AI engines
Core Web Vitals and site architecture improvements

components.name: Intake Optimization Sprint
components.blurb: Fix the leaks between lead and signed case — intake process, speed-to-lead, and conversion.

components.name: Legal Foundry Social
components.blurb: Social brand-building sprint to establish presence and content engine.

components.name: High DR Link Package
components.blurb: Concentrated high-authority link acquisition to accelerate rankings.

components.name: Ignite Website Design
components.blurb: Conversion-focused website design and build on the Rankings platform.

components.name: AI Citation Magnet
components.blurb: Proprietary data research that positions your firm as the source cited by search engines and AI platforms — generating 7–10 high-authority backlinks and 20–30 media citations.

components.name: On-Site Media Capture
components.blurb: On-site production day capturing photo and video assets, delivered within 10 business days. One round of minor revisions included.
